name: latoo-scripts
description: Company npm script runner with tabbed workspace UI, favorites, and drag-to-reorder

latooScripts.externalRun.commandTemplate.description: Shell command template used by the 'Run in external window' action. When this is left at the default Warp URI template, the extension uses a Warp Launch Configuration so the command executes immediately. The separate 'Open external tab and copy command' action always opens a Warp tab at workspacePath and copies runCommand. Custom templates run as-is. Placeholders: {workspacePath}, {scriptName}, {packageManager}, {runCommand}, {envName}, plus *Escaped and *Uri variants.

latooScripts.envName.default.description: Default envName value used by script runs and external command templates.

latooScripts.envName.useWorkspaceFolderN.description: When enabled, envName follows the active workspace folder name only for Git worktree folders; otherwise it falls back to envName.default.

latooScripts.envName.enabled.description: Controls whether envName is shown as a hint in the Latoo Scripts view header. Edit envName via settings (latooScripts.envName.default and latooScripts.envName.useWorkspaceFolderName).

latooScripts.customFavoriteCommands.enab.description: Shows configurable always-on-top custom favorite command entries in the Favorites tab.

latooScripts.customFavoriteCommands.entr.description: Custom favorite commands shown above regular favorites. Each entry supports { "name": "Label", "command": "shell command", "iconId": "optional icon id" } and runs from workspace root.

latooScripts.envName.includeScripts.description: Controls which scripts receive automatic envName injection when running scripts. Supports * wildcard patterns and optional <workspacePathPattern>::<scriptPattern> entries. Default ['*'] applies to all scripts.

latooScripts.envName.excludeScripts.description: Excludes scripts from automatic envName injection. Supports * wildcard patterns and optional <workspacePathPattern>::<scriptPattern> entries. Exclude patterns override include patterns.

latooScripts.internalRun.mode.description: Internal run mode: 'dedicated' reuses one terminal tab (Latoo Scripts • Runner) for all script runs; 'perScript' creates or reuses a terminal per workspace folder and script name.

latooScripts.internalRun.includeScripts.description: Controls which scripts use internal run behavior settings (mode/location/preserveFocus/openNewWhenBusy). Supports * wildcard patterns and optional <workspacePathPattern>::<scriptPattern> entries.

latooScripts.internalRun.excludeScripts.description: Excludes scripts from internal run behavior settings. Supports * wildcard patterns and optional <workspacePathPattern>::<scriptPattern> entries. Exclude patterns override include patterns.

latooScripts.internalRun.location.description: Primary internal run location used on script row click. 'panel' opens in the terminal panel, 'editor' opens in the terminal editor area.

latooScripts.internalRun.locationOverrid.description: Optional per-script primary internal run location overrides. Key format: <workspacePath>::<scriptName>. Value: "panel" or "editor".

latooScripts.internalRun.preserveFocus.description: When true, running a script does not steal focus from the editor; when false, focus moves to the terminal.

latooScripts.internalRun.openNewWhenBusy.description: When true, if the runner terminal is busy (a command is still executing), a new overflow terminal is created instead of interrupting the running process. Requires VS Code 1.93+ with shell integration enabled; on older versions the setting has no effect.

latooScripts.persistentTerminal.override.description: Optional per-script internal terminal style overrides. Key format: <workspacePath>::<scriptName>. Value: { "name": "My Dev", "color": "terminal.ansiBlue" }.

latooScripts.persistentTerminal.includeS.description: Controls which scripts use persistent terminal naming/color behavior. Supports * wildcard patterns and optional <workspacePathPattern>::<scriptPattern> entries.

latooScripts.persistentTerminal.excludeS.description: Excludes scripts from persistent terminal naming/color behavior. Supports * wildcard patterns and optional <workspacePathPattern>::<scriptPattern> entries. Exclude patterns override include patterns.

latooScripts.persistentTerminal.defaultC.description: Palette used to auto-pick per-script internal terminal colors when no override is configured.

latooScripts.actions.showOpenScript.description: Shows or hides the 'Open script in package.json' action button in each script row.

latooScripts.actions.showRunSecondary.description: Shows or hides the secondary run-location action button in each script row.

latooScripts.actions.showRunExternal.description: Shows or hides the 'Run in external window' action button in each script row.

latooScripts.actions.showOpenExternalTab.description: Shows or hides the 'Open external tab and copy command' action button in each script row.

latooScripts.actions.showFavorite.description: Shows or hides the favorite star action button in each script row.

latooScripts.primaryClick.target.description: Controls script row primary click behavior. 'internal' runs in internal terminal flow, 'external' runs via external run command template.

latooScripts.internalRun.alwaysNewOverri.description: Optional per-script override for always opening a new internal terminal. Key format: <workspacePath>::<scriptName>. Value: true/false.

scripts.reinstall:cursor: pnpm run package && pnpm run install:cursor
